hero-components.title: Hero Section
hero-components.desc: Classic hero with headline, CTA, and trust badges
hero-components.prompt:
Create a hero section component:
- Gradient background with decorative blurred circles
- Badge/pill at top with icon (e.g., "New Release")
- Large headline with highlighted keyword in brand color
- Subheadline/description text
- Two CTA buttons (primary and secondary/outline)
- Trust section with "Trusted by" text and company logos
- Centered layout with proper spacing.

hero-components.title: Video Background Hero
hero-components.prompt:
Create a video background hero section:
- Full-bleed video or animated gradient background
- Grid pattern overlay for texture
- Dark overlay for text readability
- Centered white text content
- Play button CTA
- Mute/unmute toggle button in corner
- "LIVE" indicator badge with pulsing dot
- Shimmer animation effect across background.

hero-components.title: Split Hero
hero-components.desc: Two-column layout with image and content
hero-components.prompt:
Create a split hero section:
- Two-column grid layout
- Left side: decorative image/graphic area with floating badges
- Right side: content with label, headline, description
- Bullet point feature list with check icons
- CTA button
- Gradient background on image side
- Layered decorative elements (rotated cards, shapes).

hero-components.title: Carousel Hero
hero-components.prompt:
Create a carousel/slider hero section:
- Multiple slides with different content and gradients
- Auto-play with interval (4 seconds)
- Left/right arrow navigation
- Dot indicators showing current slide
- Progress bar at bottom
- Fade animation between slides
- Pause auto-play when user interacts
- Each slide has badge, headline, subtext, and CTA.

hero-components.title: Announcement Bar
hero-components.prompt:
Create announcement bar components with variations:
- Promo bar with gift icon and sale code
- Alert bar with warning icon for maintenance
- Scarcity bar with clock icon and urgency message
- Update bar with megaphone for new features
- Each has gradient background, icon, text, action link, dismiss X
- Dismissible with smooth fade out
- Reset button to restore all bars
- Different color schemes per type.

hero-components.title: Animated Text Hero
hero-components.prompt:
Create an animated text hero:
- Rotating words with slide animation
- Underline accent on animated w...

hero-components.title: Countdown Hero
hero-components.prompt:
Create a countdown hero for launches:
- Live countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds)
- Gradi...

hero-components.title: Parallax Hero
hero-components.prompt:
Create a parallax hero section:
- Mouse position tracking for depth effect
- Multiple parallax layer...

css-animations.title: Pulsing Circle
css-animations.desc: Animated pulse with expanding ping rings
css-animations.prompt:
Create a pulsing circle animation:
- Central circle with emoji icon
- Use Tailwind's animate-pulse for subtle scaling
- Expanding ping rings using animate-ping
- Outer ring with custom ping animation (1.5s delay)
- Play/pause toggle button.

css-animations.title: Bouncing Dots
css-animations.desc: Staggered bounce animation for loading states
css-animations.prompt:
Create bouncing dot animation:
- Three dots in a row
- Use Tailwind's animate-bounce class
- Stagger animation with increasing delays (0.15s apart)
- Use animationDelay inline style for stagger effect
- Play/pause toggle button.

css-animations.title: Spinning Loader
css-animations.prompt:
Create a classic spinning loader:
- Circle with partial border (border-t colored, rest secondary)
- Use Tailwind's animate-spin class
- 4px border width for visibility
- Play/pause toggle button.

css-animations.title: Wave Animation
css-animations.prompt:
Create wave animation with bars:
- 8 vertical bars in a row
- Gradient from primary to accent color
- Custom keyframes for wave effect (varying heights)
- Staggered delays (0.1s apart) for wave motion
- Play/pause toggle button
- Define wave keyframes in CSS.

css-animations.title: Skeleton Loading
css-animations.prompt:
Create skeleton loading states:
- Card with avatar, image, and text line placeholders
- Animated shimmer gradient moving left to right
- Use CSS gradient with keyframes for shimmer effect
- Gray/secondary colors for placeholder blocks
- Rounded corners matching final UI.

css-animations.title: Typing Indicator
css-animations.prompt:
Create a typing indicator:
- Three dots in a chat bubble
- Dots pulse up and down sequentially
- Staggered animation delays (0.15s apart)
- Smooth easing with opacity and translateY
- Chat bubble styling with rounded corners.

css-animations.title: Floating Element
css-animations.prompt:
Create a floating element animation:
- Element moves up and down gently (translateY)
- Shadow below that scales inversely (shrinks when element rises)
- Slow, smooth keyframes (6s duration)
- Hover adds extra scale effect
- Works for icons, buttons, or avatars.

css-animations.title: Confetti Burst
css-animations.prompt:
Create CSS confetti burst:
- Trigger on button click
- 20 small colored particles (squares and circles)
- Particles fly outward with random directions
- Use CSS variables for random X, Y, and rotation
- Fade out as particles fall
- Auto-cleanup after animation (2s).

css-animations.title: Wiggle Attention
css-animations.prompt:
Create wiggle attention animation:
- Subtle rotation back and forth
- Low amplitude (3 degrees max)
- Soft easing for natural feel
- Works on buttons, badges, notifications
- Loops every 2 seconds with pause between wiggles.

css-animations.title: Slide-In Banner
css-animations.prompt:
Create slide-in notification banner:
- Slides down from top
- Gradient background
- Dismiss button with slide-out animation
- Fade + translateY for smooth entry/exit
- Auto re-appears for demo purposes.

css-animations.title: Countdown Timer
css-animations.prompt:
Create circular countdown timer:
- SVG circle with stroke-dashoffset animation
- Smooth transition on stroke change
- Number display in center
- Gradient stroke color
- Auto-resets when reaches zero.

css-animations.title: Progress Bar Fill
css-animations.prompt:
Create a gradient progress bar:
- Horizontal bar with width transition
- Gradient fill from primary to accent
- Shimmer overlay animation moving left to right
- Percentage text display
- Smooth 100ms transitions.

css-animations.title: Card Flip
css-animations.prompt:
Create card flip animation:
- Front and back content
- rotateY transform with preserve-3d
- backface-visibility hidden
- Smooth 500ms transition
- Click to toggle flip state.

css-animations.title: Accordion Animation
css-animations.prompt:
Create accordion animation:
- max-height transition for expand/collapse
- Opacity fade for content
- Rotating chevron indicator
- Cubic-bezier easing for smooth motion
- Only one item open at a time.

css-animations.title: Ripple Touch
css-animations.prompt:
Create ripple click effect:
- Ripple expands from click position
- Track click coordinates relative to button
- Scale from 0 to large with opacity fade
- Multiple ripples can exist simultaneously
- Auto cleanup after 600ms.

css-animations.title: NEON GLOW
css-animations.prompt:
Create neon text glow:
- Bold text with text-shadow animation
- Multiple shadow layers for depth
- Primary color with varying opacity
- Pulsing animation (2s infinite)
- Works on headings and labels.

css-animations.title: Rotating Gradient Border
css-animations.prompt:
Create rotating border avatar:
- Profile image with animated border
- conic-gradient for smooth color rotation
- 3px border padding for visibility
- Inner content stays static
- 3s infinite rotation animation.

css-animations.title: Orbiting Icons
css-animations.prompt:
Create orbiting icons animation:
- Icons positioned on circular path
- Rotate animation around center
- Staggered start positions
- Central "hub" element
- Dashed orbit line visible
- 10s smooth infinite loop.

css-animations.title: Number Counter
css-animations.prompt:
Create number counter animation:
- Numbers slide up into view
- Staggered delays for multiple counters
- translateY transition on reveal
- Auto-repeats for demo
- Works with suffixes (K, %, etc).

css-animations.title: Premium Experience
css-animations.prompt:

- Multi-stop gradient (primary to accent)
- Slow background-position animation
- 200% background-size for movement
- Subtle, smooth motion (8s duration)
- Great starter effect for hero sections.

- Spinning loader icon at top

- Single color chasing around edge

text-effects.title: Typewriter Effect
text-effects.prompt:
Create a typewriter text effect:
- Text types out character by character
- Blinking cursor at the end
- Configurable typing speed (50-100ms per char)
- Optional delete and retype loop
- Cursor blinks at 530ms interval
- Works with any text content.

text-effects.title: Word Rotator
text-effects.desc: Cycling through different words with transitions
text-effects.prompt:
Create a word rotator component:
- Cycles through array of words
- Fade up/down transition between words
- 2-3 second display duration per word
- Smooth CSS animation
- Works inline with other text
- Configurable word list.

text-effects.title: Text Scramble
text-effects.prompt:
Create a text scramble effect:
- Letters scramble through random characters
- Progressive reveal from left to right
- Characters cycle through symbols before settling
- 50ms frame rate for smooth animation
- Trigger on mount or button click
- Matrix/hacker aesthetic.

text-effects.title: Gradient Text Animation
text-effects.prompt:
Create animated gradient text:
- Text with moving gradient colors
- CSS background-clip: text
- 200% background-size for movement
- Animate background-position
- 3-5s animation duration
- Smooth infinite loop.

text-effects.title: Character Stagger
text-effects.desc: Letters animate in one by one
text-effects.prompt:
Create character stagger animation:
- Each letter animates individually
- Staggered delay (0.05s per character)
- Fade up from below effect
- opacity and translateY transition
- Trigger on mount or intersection
- Works with any text.

text-effects.title: Highlight Marker
text-effects.desc: Text gets highlighted like a marker
text-effects.prompt:
Create highlight marker effect:
- Animated highlight behind text
- Grows from left to right
- Yellow/accent color marker
- Slight rotation for natural look
- 0.5s animation duration
- Trigger on hover or scroll.

text-effects.title: Counting Numbers
text-effects.prompt:
Create counting number animation:
- Numbers animate from 0 to target
- Smooth easing (ease-out)
- Support for suffixes (K, M, %)
- 2s animation duration
- Trigger on intersection observer
- Format large numbers.

text-effects.title: Blinking Cursor
text-effects.prompt:
Create a line blinking cursor:
- Thin vertical line cursor (2px width)
- Blink animation toggling opacity 0 to 1
- 530ms blink interval using CSS animation
- Primary color for the cursor
- Height matches text line-height
- Use step-end timing for sharp blink.

text-effects.title: Wave Text
text-effects.desc: Letters animate in a sine wave pattern
text-effects.prompt:
Create wave text animation:
- Letters move up and down in wave pattern
- Staggered animation delays
- Smooth sine wave motion
- Infinite loop animation
- Works with any text length.

text-effects.title: Bounce Text
text-effects.desc: Letters bounce in with spring physics
text-effects.prompt:
Create bounce text animation:
- Each letter bounces in from above
- Spring physics easing
- Staggered delays per character
- Overshoot and settle effect
- Replay button for demo.

- Words fade out then fade in
- Smooth opacity transition
- 2-3 second display per word
- Works inline with static text

- Stroke draws from start to end
- stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset

navigation-components.title: Top Navigation Bar
navigation-components.desc: Sticky or static top navigation with icons
navigation-components.prompt:
Create a top navigation bar component:
- Toggle between sticky and static positioning
- Logo/brand on the left side
- Navigation links in the center (hidden on mobile)
- Action icons on the right (search, notifications, profile)
- Notification badge indicator
- Hover states on all interactive elements
- Contained preview with scrollable content to demo sticky behavior.

navigation-components.title: Hamburger Menu
navigation-components.desc: Animated mobile menu toggle with dropdown
navigation-components.prompt:
Create a hamburger menu component:
- Animated hamburger to X icon transition
- Smooth height animation for menu expansion
- Menu items with icons
- Staggered animation for menu items appearing
- Slide-in effect for each item
- Clean mobile-first design
- Close on menu item click or toggle.

navigation-components.title: Slide-In Menu
navigation-components.prompt:
Create a slide-in off-canvas menu:
- Full-height panel sliding from left
- Semi-transparent backdrop with blur
- Click outside to close
- User profile section at top
- Menu items with icons and optional badges
- Staggered animation for items
- Sign out button fixed at bottom
- Chevron indicators on hover.

navigation-components.title: Entertainment
navigation-components.prompt:
Create a mega menu dropdown:
- Hover-triggered dropdown
- Multi-column layout with categories
- Icons for each menu item
- Category headers
- Featured promotional banner at bottom
- Smooth fade and slide animation
- Chevron rotation on active state
- Maintain hover state when moving to dropdown.

navigation-components.title: Breadcrumbs

- Chevron separator style with home icon

- Pill/badge style with rounded buttons
- Contained style with background
- Current page highlighted differently
- Hover states on clickable items
- Responsive and accessible.

navigation-components.title: Floating Action Button

- Click to expand/collapse action options
- Multiple colored action buttons
- Staggered scale animation for options
- Rotate icon on toggle (plus to X)
- Shadow and hover effects
- Tooltips for each action.

- Arrow up icon centered

- Smooth scroll to top on click
- Fade and slide up animation on appear
- Hover shadow glow effect
- Sticky positioning within scrollable container.

form-components.title: Multi-Step Form
form-components.desc: Progressive form with step indicators
form-components.prompt:
Create a horizontal multi-step form with progress indicators:
- Step circles connected by horizontal progress lines
- Icons and labels for each step
- Different form fields per step (personal, contact, payment)
- Next/Back navigation buttons
- Visual feedback for completed steps (green checkmark)
- Animated transitions between steps
- Ring effect on active step.

form-components.title: Floating Label Inputs
form-components.desc: Material Design style inputs with animated labels
form-components.prompt:
Create floating label input components:
- Label inside input that floats up on focus
- Smooth transition animation for label position
- Label changes color when focused
- Border highlights on focus
- Support for different input types
- Clean, minimal design.

form-components.title: Password Strength Indicator
form-components.desc: Real-time password validation with strength meter
form-components.prompt:
Create a password input with strength indicator:
- Toggle password visibility button
- Animated strength meter bar
- Color changes based on strength (red to green)
- Checklist of requirements (length, uppercase, lowercase, number, special)
- Check/X icons for each requirement
- Real-time validation as user types
- Show/hide requirements when password has content.

form-components.title: Password Visibility Toggle
form-components.desc: Simple password input with show/hide toggle
form-components.prompt:
Create a password input with visibility toggle:
- Lock icon on the left side of the input
- Eye/EyeOff icon button on the right to toggle visibility
- Ghost button styling so it blends with input
- Toggle between type="password" and type="text"
- Accessible aria-label for the toggle button
- Clean, minimal design.

form-components.title: Forgot password?
form-components.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
form-components.prompt:
Create a forgot password flow component:
- Email input with Mail icon and zod validation
- Loading state with spinner on submit button
- Success state showing "Check your email" message
- CheckCircle icon in success state
- "Back to login" button with ArrowLeft icon
- Centered, compact layout
- Simulated API delay for demo purposes
- Form switches between request and success views.

form-components.title: Search with Suggestions
form-components.desc: Search bar with recent searches and trending suggestions
form-components.prompt:
Create a search input with suggestions dropdown:
- Search icon and clear button
- Dropdown with recent searches section
- Trending suggestions section
- Filter suggestions as user types
- Click outside to close dropdown
- Remove individual recent searches
- Visual feedback on focus (border glow, shadow)
- Icons for different suggestion types.

form-components.title: Typeform-Style Form
form-components.desc: One question at a time card-based form
form-components.prompt:
Create a Typeform-style card form experience:
- One question per screen with swipe/slide animations
- Vertical swipe transition between questions
- Progress bar showing completion
- Different question types (text, email, multiple choice)
- Keyboard navigation (Enter to continue)
- Up/Down arrow navigation buttons
- Letter shortcuts for multiple choice (A, B, C, D)
- Completion screen with thank you message.

form-components.title: Input Masks
form-components.desc: Auto-formatting for phone, date, credit card, and SSN
form-components.prompt:
Create input mask components for common formats:
- Phone number: (XXX) XXX-XXXX
- Date: MM/DD/YYYY
- Credit card: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
- SSN: XXX-XX-XXXX
- Auto-format as user types
- Strip non-numeric characters
- Icon for each input type
- Hint text showing expected format
- Monospace font for aligned numbers.

form-components.title: Validated Inputs
form-components.desc: Real-time form validation with error states
form-components.prompt:
Create a form with real-time validation using react-hook-form and zod:
- Three fields: name (min 2 chars), email (valid format), password (8+ chars, uppercase, number)
- Show validation state with colored borders (red for error, green for success)
- Display check/X icons on the right when field is touched
- Show error messages below invalid fields
- Submit button is disabled until form is valid
- Icons on the left side of each input (user, mail, lock).

form-components.title: Date Pickers
form-components.desc: Single date and date range selection
form-components.prompt:
Create date picker components using shadcn Calendar:
- Single date picker with popover trigger button
- Date range picker with two-month calendar view
- Show selected date in readable format (e.g., "December 9, 2024")
- For range, show date span and calculate number of days
- Calendar icon in trigger buttons
- Popover aligned to start
- Add pointer-events-auto class to calendar for interaction in dialogs.

form-components.title: File Upload Dropzone
form-components.desc: Drag and drop file upload with progress
form-components.prompt:
Create a file upload dropzone with drag and drop:
- Dashed border container that responds to drag events
- Visual feedback when dragging (border color, scale, background)
- Hidden file input triggered by clicking dropzone
- Show upload progress for each file with animated bar
- Display file icon based on type (image, document, generic)
- Show file size formatted (KB, MB)
- Checkmark when upload complete, X button to remove while uploading
- Support multiple file uploads.

form-components.title: Multi-Select
form-components.desc: Searchable multi-select with tags
form-components.prompt:
Create a multi-select component with search:
- Input that shows selected items as removable tags/chips
- Dropdown with checkboxes for each option
- Search/filter functionality to narrow options
- Click outside to close dropdown
- Show selected count at bottom
- Visual feedback for selected state in dropdown
- Support keyboard navigation
- Tags have X button to remove individual selections.

form-components.title: Range Sliders
form-components.desc: Single value and range sliders with labels
form-components.prompt:
Create various slider components using shadcn Slider:
- Simple single-value slider showing percentage
- Dual-handle range slider with min/max values
- Price slider with preset buttons to jump to values
- Display current value prominently
- Tick marks or labels below slider

form-components.title: Voice Typing
form-components.desc: Speech-to-text input using browser API
form-components.prompt:
Create a voice typing component using the Web Speech API:

UI Requirements:
- Microphone button that toggles recording
- Visual feedback when recording (pulsing animation)
- Stop button to end recording
- Show interim/partial transcription in real-time
- Handle browser compatibility gracefully (show message if unsupported)

Transcription Behavior (Critical):
- Accumulate all transcript segments during the session — don't send each segment individually
- Only finalize the complete, accumulated transcript when the user clicks Stop
- Handle the Web Speech API's auto-stop behavior (it stops on silence) by automatically restarting while recording is active
- Use refs (not just state) for tracking recording status to avoid stale closure issues in event handlers
- Show real-time transcription in the text box
- Add a short delay (500-1000ms) after stopping to allow final results to process before flushing the transcript

- Success state after submission.

micro-interactions.title: Scroll-Reveal Animations
micro-interactions.desc: Elements animate in as they enter viewport
micro-interactions.prompt:
Create scroll-triggered reveal animations:

- Elements start invisible and translated down
- Stagger animation with increasing delays
- Fade in and slide up simultaneously
- Inner elements (like numbers) scale in after container
- Include replay button to reset and re-trigger animations.

micro-interactions.title: Animated Counters
micro-interactions.desc: Numbers that count up when scrolled into view
micro-interactions.prompt:
Create animated number counters:

- Apply easing function (ease-out cubic) for deceleration
- Only trigger animation when element enters viewport
- Format large numbers (e.g., 12500 → 12.5K)
- Include replay button to reset counters
- 2 second animation duration.
